_comment: Each key is an English action name. Values are the accessible names (aria-label / menu text) Google Meet exposes for that control, across supported UI languages. Matching is case- and diacritic-insensitive and uses substring containment, so short tokens act as fallbacks. Order of automation: moreOptions -> manageRecording -> subtitles(uncheck) -> transcript(uncheck) -> gemini(check) -> startRecording.
subtitles: Turn on captions in the recording
gemini: Також почати створювати нотатки за допомогою Gemini
Also start taking notes with Gemini
Также начать создавать заметки с помощью Gemini
